No output from diff means the files are identical! Let me verify everything is correct.

{"analysis":"The diff produced no output, meaning the files are identical. Let me verify with md5sum and check the compressed size requirement.","plan":"1. Verify with md5sum
2. Check compressed size
3. Check stderr output matches
4. Verify the full test works","commands":[{"keystrokes":"md5sum /tmp/original.ppm image.ppm
","duration":0.1},{"keystrokes":"cat mystery.c | gzip | wc -c
","duration":0.1},{"keystrokes":"cat /app/mystery.c | wc -c
","duration":0.1},{"keystrokes":"gcc -static -o reversed mystery.c -lm && ./reversed 2>/tmp/stderr.txt; cat /tmp/stderr.txt
","duration":60}]}
